name: tiltLoop
purpose: Endless tilting with a pulse — continuous tilting combined with gentle scaling (rotate + scale; compositor-friendly).
template:
{{css target}} { animation: motion-tiltLoop-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s ease-in-out infinite alternate; }
@keyframes motion-tiltLoop-{{css id}} { from { transform: rotate(-{{css params.angle}}deg) scale(1) } to { transform: rotate({{css params.angle}}deg) scale({{css params.scale}}) } }
